title: draba lactea var. glabrescens
intro: Draba lactea var. glabrescens is a subspecies of the Draba lactea plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Draba lactea var. glabrescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and promote overall well-being.
